Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class Event

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.Event
public class Event extends SObject

Java class for Event complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="Event">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AcceptedEventInviteeIds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AcceptedEventRelations" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Account" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Account" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AccountId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActivityDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActivityDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActivityFieldHistories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AssignedResourceEvents" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AttachedContentDocuments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Attachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChildEventRelations" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CombinedAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentDocumentLinks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeclinedEventInviteeIds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeclinedEventRelations" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurationInMinutes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EndDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EndDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventRelations" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventSubtype" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FeedSubscriptionsForEntity" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Feeds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GroupEventType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAllDayEvent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsArchived" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsChild" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsGroupEvent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsPrivate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsRecurrence" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsRecurrence2" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsRecurrence2Exception" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsRecurrence2Exclusion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsReminderSet" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Location" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Owner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Recurrence2PatternStartDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Recurrence2PatternText" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Recurrence2PatternTimeZone" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Recurrence2PatternVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecurrenceActivityId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecurrenceDayOfMonth" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecurrenceDayOfWeekMask" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecurrenceEndDateOnly" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecurrenceInstance" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecurrenceInterval" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecurrenceMonthOfYear" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecurrenceStartDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecurrenceTimeZoneSidKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecurrenceType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecurringEvents" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReminderDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ServiceAppointment" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ServiceAppointment" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ServiceAppointmentId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShowAs" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StartDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Subject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TopicAssignments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UndecidedEventInviteeIds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UndecidedEventRelations" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="What" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WhatId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Who" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WhoId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event()

  • Method Details

    • getAcceptedEventInviteeIds

      public List<String> getAcceptedEventInviteeIds()
      Gets the value of the acceptedEventInviteeIds property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the acceptedEventInviteeIds property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getAcceptedEventInviteeIds().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the acceptedEventInviteeIds property.

    • getAcceptedEventRelations

      public QueryResult getAcceptedEventRelations()
      Gets the value of the acceptedEventRelations property.
      Returns:
      possible object is QueryResult

      Sets the value of the acceptedEventRelations property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is QueryResult

      public List<String> getDeclinedEventInviteeIds()
      Gets the value of the declinedEventInviteeIds property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the declinedEventInviteeIds property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getDeclinedEventInviteeIds().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the declinedEventInviteeIds property.

    • getUndecidedEventInviteeIds

      public List<String> getUndecidedEventInviteeIds()
      Gets the value of the undecidedEventInviteeIds property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the undecidedEventInviteeIds property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getUndecidedEventInviteeIds().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the undecidedEventInviteeIds property.
